allow: Bash(find /d/Nestjs/proxy_server -maxdepth 3 -type d \\\( -name db -o -name database -o -name migrations -o -name order* -o -name sql \\\))

Bash(npx ts-node -e "import * as mongoose from ''mongoose''; import * as dotenv from ''dotenv''; dotenv.config\(\); async function run\(\) { const uri = process.env.MONGO_URI || ''mongodb://localhost:27017/proxydb''; await mongoose.connect\(uri\); console.log\(''Connected''\); const r = await mongoose.connection.db.collection\(''transactions''\).deleteMany\({ transaction_id: { $gte: 900001, $lte: 900020 } }\); console.log\(''Deleted:'', r.deletedCount\); await mongoose.disconnect\(\); } run\(\).catch\(console.error\);")
